message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.count wrapper parity (franken_numpy-4zph)

Adds a passthrough wrapper (ma_count) for numpy.ma.count so
non-masked-element counting matches numpy across axis=None, int axis,
tuple axis, and optional keepdims. Test covers 1-D partial mask, 2-D
with axis=0/1/None, keepdims=True, fully-masked (count=0), plain
ndarray (all elements counted), MaskedArray with nomask, and a
3-D tuple-axis case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
